title: Soil DNA Extraction Modified Protocol for Dryland Agroecosystems
author: McKenzie L. Stock

steps.title: Soil samples should be stored cold,...
steps.instruction: Soil samples should be stored cold, at least -20 C (ideally at -80 C).

steps.title: Fill a 12 ml homogenization vial...
steps.instruction: Fill a 12 ml homogenization vial approximately 2/3 full with soil (Spex SamplePrep 6133PC-T) . Include three 6.35 mm diameter chrome steel beads (BioSpec Products Cat. No. 11079635c) .

steps.title: Homogenize at 4000 rpm for 00:00:10...
steps.instruction: Homogenize at 4000 rpm for 00:00:10 using the SPEX SamplePrep 1200 Genolyte homogenizer with the single-vial attachment for 12mL vials . Re-homogenize as needed at 4000 rpm for 00:00:10 to avoid the soil from thawing and sticking together.

steps.title: Add approximately 80 µL of soil...
steps.instruction: Add approximately 80 µL of soil sample by volume to the PowerBead Tube provided.

steps.title: Add 750 µL of PowerBead Solution to the PowerBead Tube
steps.instruction: Add 750 µL of PowerBead Solution to the PowerBead Tube.

steps.title: Add 60 µL of Solution C1...
steps.instruction: Add 60 µL of Solution C1 and invert several times or vortex briefly.

steps.title: Bead beating
steps.instruction: Bead beating: Spex 1200 Genolyte homogenizer: Place the PowerLyzer Glass Bead Tubes into the tube holder attachment for the homogenizer (holds 6) . The PowerBead Tubes must be balanced on the tube holder. Run the samples at a time and RPM suitable for your soil type. For our samples, 3000 rpm for 00:00:35 .

steps.title: Centrifuge Bead Tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge Bead Tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 00:03:00 . Note: We increased the centrifugation time to ensure that no sediment/soil is left in suspension, improving DNA quality downstream.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant to a clean 2 ml collection tube. Note: Expect 400-500 µL . Supernatant may still contain some soil particles.

steps.title: Add 250 µL of Solution C2...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL of Solution C2 and vortex for 5 sec. Incubate at 2-8°C for 5 min.

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 1 min
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 1 min. Avoiding the pellet, transfer up to 600 µL of supernatant to a clean 2 ml collection tube.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of Solution C3 and vortex briefly
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of Solution C3 and vortex briefly. Incubate at 2-8°C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 00:03:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the tubes at 10,000 x rcf for 00:03:00 . Avoiding the pellet, transfer up to 750 µL of supernatant to a clean 2 ml collection tube. Note: We increased the centrifugation time to ensure that no sediment/soil is left in suspension, improving DNA quality downstream.

steps.title: Add 1200 µL of Solution C4...
steps.instruction: Add 1200 µL of Solution C4 to the supernatant and vortex for 00:00:05 .

steps.title: Load 675 µL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Load 675 µL of the supernatant onto a MB Spin Column and centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:01:00 . Discard the flow through and add an additional 675 mL of supernatant.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:01:00 . Load the remaining supernatant onto the MB Spin Column and centrifuge at 10,000 rcf for 00:01:00 . Note: A total of three loads for each sample processed are required.

steps.title: Add 500 μl of Solution C5...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μl of Solution C5 and centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow through. Repeat this step once more: add 500 µL of Solution C5 and centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow through. Note: We repeated this washing step to minimize salt contamination, which helps improve DNA A260/230 values.

steps.title: Centrifuge again at 10,000 x rcf for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge again at 10,000 x rcf for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Carefully place the spin filter in...
steps.instruction: Carefully place the spin filter in a clean 2 ml collection tube. Avoid splashing any Solution C5 onto the MB Spin Column.

steps.title: Add 50 µL of Solution C6...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µL of Solution C6 to the center of the white filter membrane. Note: We used the minimum recommended amount of Solution C6 to yield greatest DNA concentrations.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 10,000 x rcf for 00:00:30 . Discard the MB Spin Column.

steps.title: The DNA is now ready for downstream applications
steps.instruction: The DNA is now ready for downstream applications.

steps.title: This protocol is modified from the...
steps.instruction: This protocol is modified from the Qiagen manufacturer protocol for the DNeasy PowerLyzer PowerSoil Kit . DNeasy PowerLyzer PowerSoil Kit (DNA Extraction Kit, Qiagen, 12855-50, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/discovery-and-translational-research/dna-rna-purification/dna-purification/microbial-dna/dneasy-powerlyzer-powersoil-kit/ ) .
